pi_items.source: Task description and metadata claim this path, but the task is missing setup and verifier scripts to enforce or confirm it.
Task metadata claims this path, but setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are missing, so no ground truth is ever generated.

privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and the underlying boarding pass QR code image are completely missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target directory structure requirements and expected file paths exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description.
